common.motto: Find your partner. Build your future. Grow together.
common.comingSoonBody: This part of your journey is being crafted with the same care as the rest. It arrives in an upcoming release.

trust.valuesCaption: Guided by faith, built on trust
trust.marriageCaption: Designed for a purpose that truly matters

validation.displayName: Please enter your name (at least 2 characters).
validation.password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.minAge: You must be at least {{minAge}} years old.

gate.title: Verify your identity to continue
gate.body: Matching, interests, and communication unlock once your identity is verified — this keeps the community safe and serious.

verify.title: Identity verification
verify.subtitle: A quick, private check that keeps the community safe and serious.
verify.intro: Upload a government-issued ID. Your documents are encrypted, stored privately, and reviewed only for verification — never shown on your profile.
verify.selfieHint: A selfie helps us match you to your ID faster.
verify.fileHint: JPG, PNG, WebP or PDF, up to 10 MB.
verify.privacy: Private & encrypted — used only to verify your identity.
verify.pendingBody: Thanks — your documents are being reviewed. This usually takes a short while, and your status will update here.
verify.verifiedBody: Your identity is confirmed. Matching and communication are now unlocked.
verify.rejectedBody: We couldn't verify your documents. Please review and submit again.
verify.errorFile: Use a JPG, PNG, WebP or PDF up to 10 MB.
verify.errorService: The verification service isn't available yet. Please try again later.

chat.emptyBody: This is the Introduction stage — text only, and kept respectful. Say salaam and share why you felt this could be a match.
chat.quotaReached: You've used all your introduction messages for now.
chat.contactBlocked: Contact details can't be shared before the Family stage. Please keep it on-platform for now.
chat.blockedInappropriate: That message can't be sent — please keep the conversation respectful.
chat.blockedTooSoon: Let's keep the introduction respectful and unhurried — that can come later, insha'Allah.
chat.blockedMeeting: Private meetings aren't arranged here. Families are involved at the Family stage, insha'Allah.
chat.blockedScam: Money or payment requests aren't allowed on Mithaq. This has been recorded.
chat.moderationUnavailable: Safety review is temporarily unavailable, so your message wasn't sent. Please try again shortly.
chat.notAvailable: Messaging isn't available for this connection yet.

match.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

empty.title: No recommendations yet
empty.body: We're preparing thoughtful, compatibility-based introductions for you. Check back soon.

interest.title: Send interest to {{name}}
interest.body: A short, sincere note travels with your interest. Keep it respectful — it's the first thing they'll read.
interest.notePlaceholder: Assalamu alaikum — I admired your profile and would value getting to know you with good intentions…
interest.error: Couldn't send your interest. You may already be connected.

connections.matchesEmpty: No matches yet — send an interest to begin.

profile.genderLockedNote: Gender is set at registration and locks after identity verification.

fields.bioPlaceholder: Share a little about yourself, your values, and what you seek in marriage…

photos.hint: JPG, PNG or WebP up to 5 MB. Your photos are private and shared only per your visibility settings.
photos.errorType: Please choose a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
photos.errorSize: Image must be 5 MB or smaller.

onboarding.doneBody: Beautiful work. Your profile is now {{completion}}% complete — you can refine it anytime.

home.subtitle: A calm, considered space to find a compatible partner — and to prepare for a marriage that lasts.

journey.title: Every step toward marriage, in one place
journey.subtitle: You're just getting started. Here's the path ahead — you move at your own pace.
journey.nextDetail: Verify your identity to unlock private, compatibility-based matching.

match.title: Your matches, curated
match.body: Compatibility-ranked introductions — never endless browsing. Your first recommendations arrive after verification.

assistant.title: Marriage Assistant
assistant.body: From preparing for marriage to a respectful first conversation — thoughtful guidance whenever you need it.

finance.title: Build your future together
finance.body: Plan a wedding budget and shared goals — tools that keep working long after the wedding day.

match.title: Match
match.subtitle: Meaningful, AI-curated recommendations for serious marriage.

finance.title: Finance
finance.subtitle: Build a healthy financial future together.

assistant.title: Marriage Assistant
assistant.subtitle: A respectful assistant for your whole marriage journey.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: The next important step — never noise.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your marriage profile, privacy, and verification.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Operate the platform without touching code.

guardian.title: Guardian Review
guardian.subtitle: Only the introductions explicitly shared with you.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back to your marriage journey.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: A serious, privacy-first platform for marriage.
register.genderNote: Gender is set at registration and locked after identity verification.
register.checkEmailBody: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Open it to activate your account.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: We'll email you a secure reset link.
forgot.sent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.

authCallback.title: Finishing sign-in…
authCallback.body: If this doesn't continue automatically, return to sign in.

phone.title: Phone verification
phone.subtitle: Verify your phone number to strengthen your account's trust.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.
